_publications._publicationTitle: Synergistic effect of Nutlin-3 combined with MG-132 on schwannoma cells through restoration of merlin and p53 tumour suppressors.

_contextSnippet: combined treatment with Nutlin-3 and MG-132 fully blocked tumour growth...The initial inhibition of tumour growth of both the RT4 and HEI-193 schwannomas in Nutlin-3 & MG-132 groups was observed on day 6
details: Combined Nutlin-3 and MG-132 fully blocked tumor growth in xenografts, with initial inhibition observed on day 6
